task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the contents of the 'Projects' workspace, displaying a list of documents that includes 'Project Specifications' and 'Gallery Brochure'.
The browser displays the document view or edit page specifically for the 'Project Specifications' document.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'Art' subject and assign 'Sciences' to 'Project Specifications', then save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Project Specifications' document in view mode or a 'Document modified' success message. In the metadata/properties section, the 'Subjects' or 'Topics' field must display 'Sciences' and must NOT display 'Art'.
The browser displays the document view or edit page specifically for the 'Gallery Brochure' document.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Art' subject to 'Gallery Brochure' and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Gallery Brochure' document in view mode or a 'Document modified' success message. In the metadata/properties section, the 'Subjects' or 'Topics' field must display 'Art'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to make changes rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the Nuxeo UI, clicking 'Edit' tabs, modifying form fields, and clicking 'Save', rather than using a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the Nuxeo application URL (e.g., localhost:8080/nuxeo) and the standard Nuxeo document management layout is present.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are open in the screenshots showing the final saved states of the documents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the Nuxeo Platform web interface. The target workspace is '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects'. Document 1 is 'Project Specifications' (internal name: Project-Specifications); its subject must be changed from 'art' to 'sciences' (meaning 'art' is removed and 'sciences' is added). Document 2 is 'Gallery Brochure' (internal name: Gallery-Brochure); its subject must be updated to include 'art'. Verify these changes by looking at the document properties/metadata in the Nuxeo GUI.
